title: Bee Removal in South Bronx | $350-$550
metaDescription: Professional bee removal services in South Bronx, Bronx. Safe, humane bee hive extraction from homes and businesses. Licensed experts. Call now for $350-$550 service.
intro: Best Pest Control NYC provides expert bee removal services throughout South Bronx, protecting residents and businesses from unwanted hive infestations. Our licensed technicians safely remove bee colonies from residential buildings, commercial properties, and multi-family units across the neighborhood. With over 15 years serving the Bronx community, we deliver fast, humane bee extraction at competitive rates of $350-$550.
whyUs: Our South Bronx bee removal specialists respond quickly to service calls throughout Mott Haven, Melrose, and Port Morris, understanding the unique challenges of bee infestations in the area's diverse mix of pre-war walk-ups, NYCHA housing, and renovated lofts. We combine humane removal techniques with preventative solutions to keep your property bee-free year-round.
localContext: South Bronx's vibrant neighborhoods, from the historic Hub district to the waterfront areas near Yankee Stadium, feature aging brick buildings and active commercial corridors where bees often nest in wall voids, fire escapes, and roof overhangs. The area's growing green spaces and community gardens can attract bee colonies, making professional removal services essential for property owners throughout this rapidly revitalizing section of the Bronx.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a bee hive in South Bronx?
faqs.answer: We typically respond to South Bronx bee removal requests within 24 hours and can often provide same-day service for emergency situations. Most bee hive removals are completed in 2-4 hours depending on colony size and location accessibility.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350-$550 bee removal price?
faqs.answer: Our bee removal service includes complete hive extraction, safe relocation of bees when possible, removal of honeycomb and debris, treatment of the affected area to prevent re-infestation, and sealing of entry points. The final price depends on hive size, location difficulty, and any necessary structural access.

faqs.question: Do you remove bees from older South Bronx apartment buildings?
faqs.answer: Yes, we specialize in bee removal from all types of South Bronx properties, including pre-war walk-ups, brownstones, and multi-family buildings. Our technicians are experienced working with the unique architecture of older Bronx buildings and can safely access bees in walls, cornices, and other hard-to-reach areas.

faqs.question: Are your bee removal methods safe for South Bronx residents and pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We prioritize humane, eco-friendly bee removal methods that are completely safe for families, pets, and the surrounding environment. Whenever possible, we relocate live bees to apiaries rather than exterminating them, and we use non-toxic treatments to sanitize affected areas.
